name: Hello Kitty  Mug
description: A large ceramic mug sculpted to look like Hello Kitty. Features her iconic face with a pink bow and a matching pink dress.

name: Happy Frog Mug
description: A handmade green ceramic mug shaped like a happy frog holding a yellow star. Features two large eyes and a smiling face.

name: christmas tree mug
description: A green ceramic mug shaped like a snowy Christmas tree. Features white snow details on the branches and a contrasting red handle

name: Grey Totoro Mug
description: A grey ceramic mug shaped like Totoro featuring a white belly and ears on the rim. A small white Totoro and a black soot sprite sit on the handle.

name: Gingerbread Man Mug
description: A festive mug shaped like a smiling gingerbread man. Brown glaze with white icing details, a red bow tie, and a red handle.
